title: Martin Sjogard
text:
I am a clinical data scientist working as a postdoctoral research fellow in the Sleep, Cognition and Neuropsychology lab at Massachusetts General Hospital and a postdoctoral research fellow at Harvard Medical School.
My expertise is in statistical and computational analysis of health-related data, with a focus on neuroimaging and electrophysiological signals in neuropsychiatric disorders. I develop validated, reproducible analysis pipelines and apply advanced methods (e.g., survival analysis, multivariate modeling, signal processing) to support translational research and biomarker discovery.
